name: parser
description: Extracts raw text blocks and bounding boxes from the source PDF. Falls back to OCR for scanned or sparse pages.

name: layout-analyzer
description: Enriches raw layout with column detection, heading classification, and table inference.

name: semantic-engine
description: Assigns deterministic semantic roles (heading, paragraph, list, table, artifact) and confidence scores.

name: reading-order
description: Sorts semantic nodes into logical reading order using column-band and line-grouping heuristics.

name: tag-builder
description: Constructs a hierarchical logical structure tree (Document root) from ordered semantic nodes.

name: pdf-writer
description: Produces the tagged PDF with native structure tree, marked-content overlays, document metadata, and sidecar manifest.
notes: Supports two writer modes: 'raster' (current default — renders overlay images) and 'native' (new — rewrites content stream operators in-place, preserving vector text). Mode is controlled by the profile field pdfWriter.mode which accepts 'native', 'raster', or 'auto'.

name: validator
description: Validates the tagged PDF against PDF/UA rules using veraPDF, checks contract completeness, native structure markers, and metadata.
